title: Form Confirmation Page

posts.author: darongoodwin (Daron Goodwin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I saw another post with the same question but it was never successfully addressed. In the confirmation page after a form is submitted, it has a confirmation section and right below it is a section that allows users to sign up for a Monday account. I would like to use this form but will not as long as this section is still visible to my clients, how can we get it removed??

posts.author: darongoodwin (Daron Goodwin)
posts.cookedHtml: Screen Shot 2022-03-21 at 9.42.11 AM776×613 42.5 KB

posts.author: darongoodwin (Daron Goodwin)
posts.cookedHtml: I upgraded my account to Pro, this solved the issue. For anyone else wondering.
